title: crassula expansa subsp. expansa
intro: Crassula expansa subsp. expansa, a succulent plant species, is a type of stonecrop native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Crassula expansa subsp. expansa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
